zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Collins於1506年5月2日出生在英國素瑞奧可利時，他的父親Thomas Lakeman Collins46歲，母親Agnes Isabella Harding43歲。他於大約1523年與Mary Alice Ward在英國英格蘭素福爾可布拉福德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1591年在英國巴金哈姆爾享年85歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可雷登哈爾 煙雨 哈爾斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Collins于1506年5月2日出生在英国素瑞奧可利时，他的父亲Thomas Lakeman Collins46岁，母亲Agnes Isabella Harding43岁。他于大约1523年与Mary Alice Ward在英国英格兰素福爾可布拉福德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1591年在英国巴金哈姆爾享年85岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可雷登哈爾 煙雨 哈爾斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Collins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Colin , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

Irish and Manx: shortened Anglicized from Ó Coileáin, compare Cullen , or in Man or west Ulster shortened from Mac Coileáin, compare McQuillan and McCallion . The genitival -s is a local addition to Collin and variants after the surname was Anglicized.
Americanized form of French   Colin   or   Collin   and also   Collette  .

variants.name: Colin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Alfredo, Francisco, Jesus, Ricardo, Alberto, Angel, Arturo, Eduardo, Esteban, Faustino.  French Alexandre, Andre, Armand, Georges, Henri, Jean Claude, Jean-Michel, Laurette, Lucien, Marcel, Patrice, Pierre.
French, Walloon, and Breton: from a French shortened pet form of the personal name   Nicolas   (see   Nicholas  ). This surname is also found in the Flemish part of Belgium.
English: from the personal name Colin, a diminutive of Col, itself a pet form of Nicholas .

variants.name: Kolenc
meanings: nickname from the dialect plant name kolenc ‘yellow bedstraw (Galium verum)’ or ‘common nipplewort (Lapsana communis)’. Compare Collins 3.

variants.name: Collings
meanings: English: variant of Collins or Colling , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Collins was born on 2 May 1506, in Ockley, Surrey, England, his father, Thomas Lakeman Collins, was 46 and his mother, Agnes Isabella Harding, was 43. He married Mary Alice Ward about 1523, in Bramford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1591, in Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 85, and was buried in Redenhall with Harleston, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Collins est né le 2 mai 1506, à Ockley, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Lakeman Collins, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Agnes Isabella Harding, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Mary Alice Ward environ 1523, à Bramford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1591, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterré à Redenhall with Harleston, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Collins am 2. Mai 1506 in Ockley, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Lakeman Collins 46 und seine Mutter Agnes Isabella Harding 43. Er hat um 1523 in Bramford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Mary Alice Ward geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1591 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Buckinghamshire, England und wurde in Redenhall with Harleston, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Collins è nato il il 2 maggio 1506 nel Ockley, Surrey, England, il suo padre, Thomas Lakeman Collins, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Isabella Harding, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Mary Alice Ward circa 1523, nel Bramford, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Roger Collinsが1506年5月2日にイギリススリーオックリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Lakeman Collinsは46歳，母Agnes Isabella Hardingは43歳であった。約1523年にイギリスイギリススフォルクブラムフォードでMary Alice Wardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1591年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで85歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクレデンハル ウィス ハーレストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Collins(이)가 1506년 5월 2일 영국 수리 옥클리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Lakeman Collins(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Isabella Harding(은)는 43세였다. 그는 대략 1523년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 브램퍼드에서 Mary Alice Ward(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1591년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 레데홀 위스 하를레스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Collins nasceu em 2 de maio de 1506, em Ockley, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Lakeman Collins, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Isabella Harding, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Alice Ward aproximadamente 1523, em Bramford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1591, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 85 anos, e foi sepultado em Redenhall with Harleston, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Collins родился 2 мая 1506 г. в местности оккли, сурри, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Lakeman Collins было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Isabella Harding, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Alice Ward около 1523 г. в местности брамфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1591 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 85 лет и был похоронен в местности реденолл вит харльстон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Mary Alice Ward aproximadamente 1523, en Bramford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1591, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 85 años, y fue sepultado en Redenhall with Harleston, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
